description: After evidence enrichment — substrate enriches, debt evolves

enrichment_state.primary_mechanism: Domain ID correction via semantic name matching
enrichment_state.secondary_mechanism: Confidence recalculation from corrected component evidence
enrichment_state.path_b_limitation: No code graph available. Enrichment ceiling bounded by SDC HTML extraction.

domain_id_correction_summary.problem: Proposition bridge matched canonical→SDC domains by ID. IDs use different numbering schemes.
domain_id_correction_summary.solution: Semantic name matching — match canonical domain names to SDC domain names
domain_id_correction_summary.result: 12 of 16 accepted domains received corrected component counts. 3 domains (DOMAIN-05, DOMAIN-08, DOMAIN-11) have NO SDC name match.
